body.raw:
{
    "code": "karim00011",
    "scope": "package",  // global(order), product, package, category  **NOTE: if you add product or category or package to coupone you must not select global
    "discount_type": "percent", // (fixed, percent)  you must select discount type if global
    "discount_value": 5,
    "start_at": "2026-03-01T00:00:00Z", // YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SSZ   OR   YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SS+03:00
    "end_at":   "2026-03-31T23:59:59Z",  // // YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SSZ   OR   YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SS+03:00
    "is_active": true, // optional default is true
    "max_usage": 50     // optional
}
